summary: W938 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while consolidating W937's separate endpoint closed-embedding, open-map, and ShortExact leaves into one endpoint MetrizableLCA.strictShortExact field. endpointShortExactOfEndpointStrictExactPrimitiveW938 derives W937's ShortExact endpoint witness from ExactAt plus strict surjectivity, then delegates through the W937/W936/W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W938 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W938 only refines W937's endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ShortExact leaves into one endpoint strictShortExact field, while that witness and the rest of the W938 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W938 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W938 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, one endpoint strictShortExact witness field, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the component-level unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-seven W938 closed-map target-compact endpoint-strict-exact unit-strict-exact-components explicit inputs.

Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
